# ViewPhoto.TV

> Show selected photos from your phone on any Smart TV via QR code. No apps. No accounts. No screen mirroring. Total privacy.

ViewPhoto.TV is a free browser-based tool. Open the site on your TV, a QR code appears, scan it with your phone, select photos from your device, Google Photos, or iCloud Photos — only those photos appear on the TV. Your full gallery, notifications, and private content remain hidden.

## Key facts

- Works on any Smart TV with a browser (Samsung, LG, Sony, Philips, Google TV, Android TV)
- Works on iPhone and Android
- No apps, no accounts, no Wi-Fi pairing required
- Select photos from local storage, Google Photos, or iCloud Photos via the browser photo picker
- Multiple people can scan the same QR code and upload photos simultaneously
- Photos stored temporarily on Cloudflare; deleted automatically when the session ends (default: 180 minutes)
- All communication encrypted via HTTPS
- No personal data collected, no tracking, no analytics

## How it works

1. Open viewphoto.tv in the TV browser — a unique QR code appears
2. Scan the QR code with your phone
3. Select photos from your gallery, Google Photos, or iCloud Photos
4. Photos instantly appear on the TV in a clean gallery with full-screen viewer

## Comparison with alternatives

| | AirPlay | Miracast | HDMI | ViewPhoto.TV |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Full gallery hidden | No | No | Yes (cable) | **Yes** |
| No notifications on TV | No | No | Yes | **Yes** |
| Any TV | No (Apple) | No (Android) | Yes | **Yes** |
| Any phone | iPhone | Android | Yes | **Yes** |
| No setup required | No | No | No (cable) | **Yes** |
| Multi-user uploads | No | No | No | **Yes** |

## Author

Created by Vadim Sazanovich, Amaryllis Polska.
